task_completion.description: Microsoft Edge is opened and navigated to the test page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Microsoft Edge browser window is visible with 'localhost:8000' in the address bar, displaying the test page.

task_completion.description: Edge Developer Tools are used to inspect the elements.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The DevTools panel is open, showing either the 'Elements' and 'Computed' tabs being used to inspect the page, or the 'Console' being used to run getComputedStyle.

task_completion.description: The style_audit.json file is created on the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'style_audit.json' is visible on the Desktop, or a terminal/text editor shows the file being created/saved at /home/ga/Desktop/style_audit.json.

task_completion.description: The JSON file contains the correct heading font and button color.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of the JSON file are visible (e.g., in a text editor or terminal `cat` output) and contain `"heading_font": "DejaVu Sans"` and `"button_color": "rgb(0, 128, 255)"` (allow slight variations in RGB values up to 5 units).

task_completion.description: The JSON file contains the correct alert border width and footer opacity.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of the JSON file are visible and contain `"alert_border_width": "6px"` and `"footer_opacity": "0.75"`.

integrity.description: The agent actually used Edge DevTools to inspect the elements.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with the DevTools UI (Computed tab or Console) to find the values, rather than just guessing or using an external script.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual Microsoft Edge browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Microsoft Edge graphical user interface is visible, not just a headless browser or curl command.

integrity.description: The agent didn't use a pre-written script to bypass manual inspection.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent manually navigated the browser and DevTools, and manually created or typed the JSON file contents, rather than executing a single script that does everything automatically.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct computed values are: heading_font is 'DejaVu Sans', button_color is 'rgb(0, 128, 255)' (allow slight variations in RGB values up to 5 units), alert_border_width is '6px', and footer_opacity is '0.75'. The JSON file must be located at /home/ga/Desktop/style_audit.json.
